allow: Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/postgresql@14/bin/psql -U ndizeye -c "SELECT name, default_version FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name IN \('postgis','pg_trgm','unaccent','uuid-ossp'\);")
Bash(psql -U ndizeye -c "SELECT name, default_version FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name IN \('postgis','pg_trgm','unaccent','uuid-ossp'\);")
Bash(psql -d postgres -c "SELECT name, default_version FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name IN \('postgis','pg_trgm','unaccent','uuid-ossp'\) ORDER BY name;")
Bash(psql -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE mapplus OWNER postgres ENCODING 'UTF8' LC_COLLATE 'C' LC_CTYPE 'C' TEMPLATE template0;")
Bash(psql -d mapplus -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm; CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS unaccent; CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS \\"uuid-ossp\\";")
Bash(psql -d mapplus -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis; CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgis_topology;")
Bash(LC_ALL=C /usr/local/opt/postgresql@17/bin/psql -p 5434 -d postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE mapplus ENCODING '\\''UTF8'\\'' LC_COLLATE '\\''C'\\'' LC_CTYPE '\\''C'\\'' TEMPLATE template0;')
